stemHtml: What are the currently available modes of NAVSTAR/GPS?

options.a: Selective Availability Service (SAS) and Receiver Autonomous Integrity Monitoring (RAIM)
options.b: Standard Positioning Service (SPS) and Precise Positioning Service (PPS)
options.c: Mode-C Positioning Service (MCPS) and Mode-S Coordinate Positioning Service (SCPS)
options.d: Civilian Positioning Service (CPS) and Military Positioning Service (MPS)
